THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ABBOTT, ROSCOE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1742 FILLMORE ST, #2, S.F, CA. $3,955.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,955.00, IF DEF. VACATES AS AGREED THERE IS NO MONEY JUDGMENT. DEF. TO DROP OFF KEYS AT DEF. ATTY OFFICE 1732 FILLMORE. EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & FEES. NO WASTE COMMITTED ON PREMISES ASIDE FROM NORMAL WEAR & TEAR. SEE FILE FOR COM- PLETE JUDGMENT DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
